results.title: Farmers Besiege Collector’s Office in Bhawanipatna Over Paddy Registration
results.description: Farmers from Indravati Megalift irrigation areas staged a massive protest in Bhawanipatna on Tuesday, besieging the district collector’s office over exclusion from paddy registration. For the past 12 days, cultivators from Kokasara and Dharmagarh blocks have sat in dharna, demanding registration to sell their harvested paddy. With no resolution, thousands marched from Balaji temple in [...] The post Farmers Besiege Collector’s Office in Bhawanipatna Over Paddy Registration appeared first on Pragativadi I Latest Odisha News in English I Breaking News .

results.title: President ‘so overly proud’ of sister Margaret who is being held by Israel
results.description: President Catherine Connolly said she is ‘really worried’ about her sister’s welfare after she was detained by Israeli soldiers on a flotilla heading to Gaza. The President also said she is ‘overly proud’ of Dr Margaret Connolly, who was detained alongside at least six other Irish nationals near Cyprus yesterday. The Global Sumud Flotilla (GSF) [...]

results.title: Punjab AAP demands Local Area Development Fund for MLAs
results.description: Addressing the media at Chandigarh, AAP MLAs Aman Arora, H S Phoolka and others demanded that the state government pass the MLA Local Area Development Fund Bill 2017 in the coming Assembly session. Arora said that the MLA Local Area Development Fund has been introduced in many states which is similar to that of MPLAD Fund introduced by Government of India in year 1993.

results.title: APGA Reps Aspirant Pledges Loyalty To Party
results.description: Ahead of this Saturday’s All Progressives Grand Alliance (APGA) primary elections for selection of the party’s Senate and House of Representatives candidates for the coming 2027 general election, an aspirant for the party’s ticket for Awka-North/Awka-South Federal Constituency of Anambra State, Ozo Azubuike Ekweozor, has solicited the support of the party members to fly its [...]
